Class MenuDAO

java.lang.Object
com.project.dao.MenuDAO
public class MenuDAO extends Object
Data Access Object for menu and category management.

This class provides database operations for managing menu items, categories, and their relationships. It handles CRUD operations for menu items and provides compatibility methods for existing controllers.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    MenuDAO.CategoryRow
    Immutable holder for a category row from the categories table.

  • Constructor Details

    • MenuDAO

      public MenuDAO()
      Constructs a new MenuDAO instance. This DAO handles menu item and category management operations.

  • Method Details

    • getActiveCategories

      public List<MenuDAO.CategoryRow> getActiveCategories()
      Returns all active categories from the categories table, ordered by category_id.
      Returns:
      active categories

    • getCategoryNameById

      public String getCategoryNameById(int categoryId)
      Returns the category name for a given ID from the categories table. Falls back to "Category N" if not found.
      Parameters:
      categoryId - ID of category name
      Returns:
      category name

    • getCategoryIds

      public List<Integer> getCategoryIds()
      Returns distinct category_id values from menu_items.
      Returns:
      category id values

    • getMenuItemsByCategory

      public List<MenuItem> getMenuItemsByCategory(int categoryId)
      Returns all active menu items for a given category_id.
      Parameters:
      categoryId - ID of category
      Returns:
      active menu items matching category_id

    • getAllMenuItems

      public List<MenuItem> getAllMenuItems()
      Returns ALL active menu items (all categories).
      Returns:
      active menu items

    • addMenuItem

      public void addMenuItem(MenuItem item)
      Adds a new menu item to the database.
      Parameters:
      item - the menu item to add

    • updateMenuItemPrice

      public void updateMenuItemPrice(int menuItemId, double newPrice)
      Updates the price of a menu item.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - the menu item id
      newPrice - the new price for the menu item

    • deleteMenuItem

      public void deleteMenuItem(int menuItemId)
      Soft deletes a menu item by marking it as inactive.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - the menu item id

    • getCategories

      public List<String> getCategories()
      Returns a list of active category names.

      Compatibility method for cashier-menu controllers.

      Returns:
      list of category names

    • getCategoryIdByName

      public Integer getCategoryIdByName(String categoryName)
      Returns the category id by name.
      Parameters:
      categoryName - the category name
      Returns:
      the category id by name.

    • getMenuItemsByCategoryId

      public List<MenuItem> getMenuItemsByCategoryId(Integer categoryId)
      Returns menu items for a given category ID, handling null input.

      Compatibility method for cashier-menu controllers.

      Parameters:
      categoryId - the category id
      Returns:
      list of menu items, or empty list if categoryId is null

    • addMenuItem

      public boolean addMenuItem(String name, double price, int categoryId)
      Adds a new menu item with the specified parameters.

      Attempts modern schema first, falls back to legacy schema if needed.

      Parameters:
      name - the display name
      price - the item price
      categoryId - the category id
      Returns:
      true if the item was added successfully, false otherwise

    • addMenuItemReturningId

      public int addMenuItemReturningId(String name, double price, int categoryId)
      Adds a menu item returning id.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name
      price - the item price
      categoryId - the category id
      Returns:
      the int.

    • deleteRecipesForItem

      public void deleteRecipesForItem(int menuItemId)
      Deletes all recipe rows for a menu item.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - the menu item id

    • saveRecipe

      public void saveRecipe(int menuItemId, List<Integer> ingredientIds)
      Inserts recipe rows (menu_item_id, ingredient_id) for a menu item.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - the menu item id
      ingredientIds - list of ingredient IDs to associate with the menu item

    • updateMenuItem

      public boolean updateMenuItem(int itemId, String name, double price)
      Updates a menu item's name and price.

      Attempts modern schema first, falls back to legacy schema if needed.

      Parameters:
      itemId - the ID of the menu item to update
      name - the display name
      price - the item price
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise
